_doctrine_note: Substrate-test fixture per COGOS_PROCESS_DETERMINISM §10.9. NOT a real ARC corpus task. The rule encoded here is 'output = R×C grid filled with the color of the largest 4-connected object.' An arc-hybrid-solver with strategy='largest_object_color_fill' achieves 100% accuracy on every test pair. Background = 0. Largest-object tie-break is PD-I9 (smaller id wins = scan-order seed earlier in row-major).
